title: tephrosia filipes subsp. longifolia
intro: Tephrosia filipes subsp. longifolia, also known as the Long-Leaf Horsefly Tree, is a plant species native to South Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephrosia filipes subsp. longifolia include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. Tephrosia filipes subsp. longifolia is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
